rules.rule: PR title must follow the format: [CATEGORY]: [Description Of Work Completed].
[CATEGORY] must be in CAPS and taken from the approved category list.
[Description Of Work Completed] must be written in Pascal Case.
The PR description should include additional information helpful to the approver, such as screenshots of controller responses.
To auto-close an issue on merge, add 'Closes #[issue-number]' in the PR description.
To auto-close multiple issues, list each separately: 'Closes #10, closes #123'.
To link an issue without auto-closing, add #[issue-number] without a keyword.
PR title category must not be lowercase or mixed-case.
PR title description must not be vague.
PR title must not use a category that is not in the approved category list.
